items.name: Hybrid-Nlp-disease-diagnosis
items.description: A hybrid NLP and machine learning framework for automated disease diagnosis using patient symptom data with feature extraction, feature fusion, and classification models.

items.name: My-Learning-AI
items.description: A structured Artificial Intelligence learning repository containing hands-on experiments, machine learning implementations, AI notebooks, and beginner-to-advanced projects built with Python, Scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: llm-cardiovascular-synthetic-data
items.description: Repository containing LLM-generated synthetic cardiovascular datasets and a comprehensive analytical framework for assessing their structural coherence, statistical realism, and machine learning utility using a real-world reference cohort and an integrative ensemble meta-learning approach for cardiovascular risk prediction.

items.name: Predictive_pulse
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework for proactive blood pressure risk assessment. Featuring comprehensive data analysis, multi-algorithm comparison, and a Flask-based web application for real-time predictions.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, tutorials, datasets, and research papers in machine learning. This list covers a wide array of topics, from foundational algorithms to modern techniques in supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

items.name: awesome-ai
items.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources for Artificial Intelligence (AI). This list covers everything from foundational machine learning and deep learning to specialized areas like NLP, computer vision, and AI ethics.

items.name: MeaningFlux
items.description: Open-source Python GUI implementing the MeaningFlux analytical framework for eddy covariance data: standardized visualization, gap-filling, footprint/fetch metrics, machine-learning predictability, and information-theoretic diagnostics.

items.name: Chemeng-277-Project---Data-Driven-TPS-Discovery
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting material properties and screening Thermal Protection System (TPS) candidate materials using linear regression and random forest models. The project includes ablation studies, property prediction, and ranking of high-temperature materials for aerospace applications.

items.name: carbon-foam-ml-predictor
items.description: This is a machine learning framework for predicting compressive strength of carbon foams using ensemble regression (Random Forest + XGBoost) with interactive Streamlit deployment.

items.name: PyCaretAgent
items.description: PyCaretAgent is an autonomous AI agent framework that extends PyCaret with advanced reasoning and tool-use capabilities using the Google Generative AI SDK (google-adk). It bridges the gap between natural language requirements and production-ready machine learning pipelines.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: AutoSCEP
items.description: AutoSCEP - Machine learning-enabled automated framework for large-scale transmission capacity expansion planning with statistical parameter selection

items.name: Machine-Learning
items.description: Learn practical machine learning with NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn, and more. Learn data analysis, feature engineering, and deep learning using industry-standard frameworks. Basic Python required.

items.name: Predictive-Pulse-BP-Analysis
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework for proactive blood pressure risk assessment. Featuring comprehensive data analysis, multi-algorithm comparison, and a Flask-based web application for real-time predictions.

items.name: Predicting-the-cost-of-Bitcoin
items.description: A learning project within the framework of a machine learning course

items.name: VidyaDrishti
items.description: A Predictive Machine Learning Framework for Early Detection of Slow Learners using the XGBoost algorithm. Analyzes academic indicators such as to identify those who are at risk early. An interactive dashboard allows educators to input student data and receive predictions for timely academic intervention.

items.name: awesome-mlops
items.description: A curated list of tools, frameworks, platforms, and resources for Machine Learning Operations (MLOps).

items.name: blazerpc
items.description: A lightweight, framework-agnostic gRPC library for serving machine learning models in Python.

items.name: Minerva
items.description: Minerva is a framework for training machine learning models for researchers.

items.name: An-Explainable-Hybrid-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Fake-Job-Posting-Detection
items.description: Built an Explainable AI system for fake job posting detection using TF-IDF text features and credibility metadata. Trained and compared Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM, and stacking ensemble models. Used SHAP for model interpretability and deployed a real-time Streamlit application for fraud detection.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: Adsorption-Isotherm-Prediction-using-Low-Rank-Modelling
items.description: Machine learning framework based on Low Rank Models (LRM) for reconstructing incomplete adsorption matrices and predicting adsorption isotherms across material-pressure space.

items.name: LSA
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting agriculture terrace suitability using positive and unlabelled datasets: an application for the Troodos Mountains, Cyprus

items.name: ABLkit
items.description: An efficient Python toolkit for Abductive Learning (ABL), a novel paradigm that integrates machine learning and logical reasoning in a unified framework.

items.name: .github
items.description: Execution tooling and reference implementations for governed datasets compatible with the Access-PoD governance framework and the Q-Pathformer multi-state machine learning architecture.

items.name: tbg-stm-ftldos-hubbard-U-regression
items.description: Machine learning framework for inferring interaction-dependent features from simulated STM-derived Fourier-transformed local density of states (FT-LDOS) images in TBG moiré systems.

items.name: anamoly-Detection-
items.description: This repository contains a high-precision anomaly detection framework designed to monitor health metrics and identify significant deviations using the **Isolation Forest** machine learning algorithm.s

items.name: pamiq-core
items.description: Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

items.name: Cross_Domain_Predictive_Analytics_Dashboard
items.description: An advanced web-based data platform using Python frameworks that integrates multiple data sources and applies machine learning for predictive analytics.

items.name: IoT_CyberAttack_Classification
items.description: In the rapidly evolving landscape of Internet of Things (IoT), ensuring the security of connected devices is of paramount importance. This project or Master's thesis aims to address this critical concern by proposing a robust framework for the classification of cyber attacks on IoT using advanced machine learning techniques.

items.name: ML_From_Scratch
items.description: A compact machine learning framework implemented from scratch using NumPy.

items.name: SparseBank
items.description: SparseBank is a machine-learning–assisted framework for reducing matched-filter template banks. By learning the object masses it allows to significantly reduce the CBC templates that preserve detection sensitivity while significantly lowering computational cost.

items.name: Machine-Learning---Abalone-Dataset-CA1-
items.description: This project is about analyzing the Abalone dataset using the CRISP-DM framework. The main goal is to use machine learning to predict the physical features of abalones (classification for sex and regression for age). This can help replace the old, slow, and invasive method of cutting the shell and counting the rings under a microscope.

items.name: AlphaFlow-MT5-ML-DL-Trading-Lab
items.description: AlphaFlow ML & DL Trading Bot is an end-to-end machine learning and deep learning trading framework for MetaTrader 5. It covers data loading, feature engineering, model training/tuning, backtesting with vectorbt, and live deployment—all in one repository.

items.name: ML4Monsoons
items.description: This framework integrates large-scale NMME data and multi-platform observations to advance seasonal monsoon forecasting. This framework is developed using super-ensemble machine learning models to downscale, bias-correct, and generalize global forecasts into high-resolution regional climate intelligence for precipitation and temperature

items.name: Red-Teaming-for-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: retail-ts-ml
items.description: End-to-end time series machine learning framework for retail sales trend analysis — synthetic data generation, EDA, feature engineering, forecasting, and evaluation.

items.name: IFRS-9-Expected-Credit-Loss-ECL-Modeling-using-Advanced-Machine-Learning
items.description: This project develops a predictive framework for credit risk under IFRS 9 standards. It leverages a dataset of over 32,500 entries to predict the Probability of Default (PD).

items.name: ECML_PKDD_2026_TurboFan
items.description: This is a python package to reproduce the results for a paper entitled : "A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation"

items.name: Edge-Intelligence-Supporting-Logistics-Operation
items.description: Supply chain delays cause major financial losses. This project uses machine learning to identify high-risk routes, giving operators a targeted, data-driven framework to strategically invest in IoT infrastructure, reduce delays, and protect profits.

items.name: Multi-scale-drought-forecasting-stacked-ensemble
items.description: Machine learning framework for multi-scale drought forecasting using heterogeneous stacked ensembles. Integrates Random Forest and SVM base learners with Linear and Ridge regression meta-learners to predict SPEI-based drought (SPEI-3, SPEI-6) using climate variables such as rainfall, temperature, humidity, wind speed, and solar radiation.

items.name: CGMacros-Multimodal-AI-for-Multiple-Horizon-Glucose-Prediction
items.description: This project develops a multimodal machine learning framework to forecast post-meal glucose spikes across multiple horizons of 1, 3, and 6 hours. By utilizing the CGMacros dataset, the system integrates continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data, nutritional features, clinical biomarkers, and AI-derived food image embeddings.

items.name: SDN-SmartGuard-ML
items.description: Framework de Rede Definida por Software (SDN) com monitoramento inteligente via Machine Learning (Isolation Forest). Automatização de fluxos OpenFlow para detecção de anomalias e redução de custos em infraestruturas de TIC utilizando Ryu Controller e Mininet.

items.name: Merlion
items.description: Merlion: A Machine Learning Framework for Time Series Intelligence

items.name: City-Wise-Crime-Analysis-and-Prediction
items.description: A Machine Learning Based Framework for City-Wise Crime Analysis and Forecasting using monthly aggregated time-series data.

items.name: model_tools
items.description: auto machine learning framework

items.name: SwarmTorch
items.description: A distributed machine learning framework designed for real-world edge deployments where devices are resource-constrained, connections are unreliable and trust cannot be assumed. Built in Rust from the ground up, it brings swarm intelligence and federated learning primitives to environments where PyTorch and TensorFlow cannot operate.

items.name: Quantum-ML-Bone-Cancer-Diagnosis
items.description: Hybrid Quantum-Classical Machine Learning framework for improving bone cancer diagnosis using medical X-ray imaging and parameterized quantum circuits.

items.name: FusedSCEquiTensorPot
items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.name: ssc-landsat
items.description: A machine learning framework for estimating suspended sediment concentration (SSC) across U.S. rivers using 40 years of Landsat imagery and CatBoost regression.

items.name: transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: physics-informed-drilling-ml
items.description: Physics-Informed Machine Learning Framework for Real-Time Drilling Fluid Rheology Prediction using Sensor Data and Navier–Stokes Constraints

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Prediction-of-Social-Media-Performance-Metrics-Using-Instagram-Data
items.description: It utilizes advanced machine learning and data visualization techniques to analyze  engagement metrics like likes, comments, shares, and impressions to optimize content strategies.Developed expertise in applying machine learning to real-world social media  data, creating insightful visualizations, and building a robust predictive framework.

items.name: AR-SSRF-Framework-Main-Pipeline-for-molecular-property-prediction
items.description: The **AR-SSRF (Autoregressive Semi-Supervised Random Forest)** framework is a complete machine learning pipeline for **molecular property prediction** using **semi-supervised learning**

items.name: hsa-binding-pose-ml
items.description: Machine-learning framework for binding pose identification on human serum albumin using docking and MD-derived features

items.name: Hydro-Arid-Intelligence-Framework-for-Wadi-Water-Harvesting-Groundwater-Dynamics
items.description: tegrated computational system coupling hydraulic flood routing, D8 flow accumulation algorithms, and machine learning ensembles to optimize check dam placement and predict groundwater fluctuations in hyper-arid coastal deserts under climate forcing scenarios.

items.name: EcoXAI-Framework
items.description: An IoT-Driven Explainable AI Framework that monitors and explains Water Footprint in AI Data Centres and Crypto Mining using XAI, Machine Learning and Power BI.

items.name: pennylane-qrack
items.description: The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: MLJ.jl
items.description: A Julia machine learning framework

items.name: Microsoft-Applied-AI-Engineer-Professional-Certification-Projects-using-Python-
items.description: Microsoft Applied AI Engineering projects covering Python development, applied data science, machine learning, and deep learning using frameworks such as PyTorch and Keras. It includes specialisations in generative AI and NLP, alongside real-world industry projects and a capstone applying AI solutions to business problems.

items.name: coevolutionary-episteme
items.description: A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

items.name: transformers-avf
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Analysing-and-Forecasting-LPG-Futures-Prices-Using-Machine-Learning-Techniques-
items.description: End-to-end machine learning and time-series framework for LPG price forecasting using LSTM, XGBoost, SARIMAX, Prophet, and VAR. Includes feature engineering, ensemble stacking, SHAP explainability, and backtesting to evaluate predictive performance and improve commodity price forecasting.

items.name: Model-Behavioral-Testing-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.

items.name: FSSH-in-MLatom
items.description: Repository associated with article "Flexible Framework for Surface Hopping: From Hybrid Schemes for Machine Learning to Benchmarkable Nonadiabatic Dynamics"

items.name: AI-Model-Benchmarking
items.description: A machine learning benchmarking framework comparing Logistic Regression, Random Forest, SVM, TensorFlow, and PyTorch models across multiple real-world datasets with automated preprocessing and performance visualization.

items.name: Elastic-Guardian
items.description: Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.

items.name: frogbox
items.description: An opinionated machine learning framework.

items.name: 2026-02-ARTM-GS-ST-092
items.description: IoT-Enabled Machine Learning Framework for Knee Health Assessment Using VAG Signals

items.name: ML-SHAP-SCAPS
items.description: Machine Learning–SHAP–SCAPS framework for solar cell optimization

items.name: Project-
items.description: Data-First AI Framework with Autonomous Data Agents and Synthetic Data for Reliable Machine Learning

items.name: systematic-trading-framework
items.description: A high-performance framework for building intelligent trading systems that fuse mathematics, data science, and market intuition. Integrates quantitative research, machine learning, and risk analytics to generate alpha, manage exposure, and refine execution across multiple asset classes and evolving market conditions.

items.name: Hepa-HISS
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework Integrating Hybrid Feature Selection and Interaction Modeling for Hepatitis C Stage Prediction

items.name: Heart-Disease-Survival-Prediction-Framework
items.description: Heart Disease Survival Prediction Framework is a machine learning project that predicts short-term heart failure risk using clinical data. It combines IPCW (Inverse Probability of Censoring Weighting) with LightGBM to handle censored survival data and improve prediction reliability, achieving an AUC of about 0.80 for 90-day risk prediction.

items.name: financial-forecasting-a
items.description: Developed a comparative framework evaluating five time-series and machine learning models for stock market forecasting. The best-performing model was identified through error metric analysis and subsequently hybridized with machine learning models to capture both linear and non-linear patterns in financial data. Designed a dashboard for the results

items.name: Secure-and-Interpretable-Credit-Scoring-with-Federated-AI
items.description: This project proposes a decentralized machine learning framework where multiple financial institutions collaboratively train a credit scoring model without sharing raw customer data, ensuring privacy, transparency, and fairness in financial decision-making.

items.name: Applying-Machine-Learning-to-Improve-Automotive-Validation-Workflows
items.description: Build a Machine Learning based framework that automatically generates validation test cases from system requirements and analyzes test results.

items.name: ML-Drift-Monitor
items.description: Machine Learning Drift Monitoring framework that detects data drift, prediction drift, and concept drift using KS Test, PSI, and model performance monitoring with a Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: Volta
items.description: A Rust powered PyTorch-like Machine Learning framework.

items.name: BreastCancer-AI
items.description: BreastCancer-AI: An Interpretable Machine Learning Framework for Breast Tumor Classification Using the Wisconsin Diagnostic Dataset

items.name: NANOMATERIAL-CLASSIFICATION-RESEARCH
items.description: Nanomaterial Classification Research Framework (NCRF) is an open-source Python platform for physics-based analysis and machine learning classification of low-dimensional nanomaterials. The framework bridges quantum mechanical modeling with statistical data science to enable quantitative structure-property relationship studies across 0D, 1D, 2D, 3D.

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: NeuroPulseML-AI-for-Human-Electrical-Signal-Diagnostics
items.description: NeuroPulseML is an experimental machine learning framework designed to detect early-stage medical conditions by analyzing the electric signals emitted from the human body.

items.name: PMR-Based-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-PdM-in-IIoT
items.description: Predictive maintenance system for rotating machinery using ESP32-based vibration and temperature monitoring. Sensor data from ADXL345, SW420, and DHT11 is processed to extract condition monitoring features, and machine learning models such as Random Forest, Isolation Forest, and XGBoost are used to detect anomalies and predict machine faults.

items.name: D.R.I.S.H.T.I
items.description: An AI-powered Decision Intelligence Framework for UIDAI that detects security anomalies, predicts biometric exclusion risks, and maps migration trends using Machine Learning.

items.name: Neurobridge-AI

items.name: AI-Transparency-Tools
items.description: A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.

items.name: AI-Ethics-Evaluation-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for evaluating the ethical implications of machine learning models, focusing on fairness, explainability, and accountability.

items.name: Bias-Detection-in-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

items.name: mlcolvar
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations

items.description: Machine Learning-Based Classification Framework for Detecting Fraudulent Cryptocurrency Platforms using URL and Domain Intelligence: Using CryptoScamDB & PhiUSIIL
